command: cd /root/MT5-PropFirm-Bot && echo '=== Branch ===' && git branch --show-current && echo '=== Fetch ===' && git fetch origin claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU 2>&1 && git checkout claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU 2>&1 && git pull origin claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU 2>&1 && echo '=== Copy EA ===' && cp -v EA/* '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/' 2>&1 && echo '=== Copy configs ===' && cp -v configs/* '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Files/PropFirmBot/' 2>&1 && echo '=== Kill MT5 ===' && killall -9 terminal64.exe 2>/dev/null; sleep 3 && echo '=== Try compile ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine WINEDEBUG=-all STAGING_WRITECOPY=1 && timeout 90 wine '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MetaEditor64.exe' /compile:'/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.mq5' /log /include:'/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot' 2>&1; echo "MetaEditor exit: $?" && echo '=== Check ex5 ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts' -name '*.ex5' -ls 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Compile log ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.log' 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' || echo 'No compile log' && echo '=== Restart MT5 ===' && cd '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && wine terminal64.exe & sleep 5 && echo 'MT5 started'
